title: feat(hunch): schema migration, team git-merge, and compaction (out of MVP)
context:
Three features to take the Project Hunch past MVP, each hardened over two rounds
of multi-agent adversarial review (25 confirmed findings fixed, incl. data-loss
bugs the first cut introduced).

Schema versioning + migration (core/migrate.ts, core/io.ts):
- .hunch/manifest.json records the on-disk schema version; loadAll migrates raw
  JSON UP to the current version BEFORE Zod validation, so a future schema change
  never makes the loader silently skip (drop) old records.
- `hunch migrate` persis
decision: Introduced src/cli, src/core, src/integrations, src/store, test/compact.test.ts, test/merge.test.ts: added read, lf, writeFileAtomic, safeRm, Migration, Manifest, readManifest, writeManifest; new dep(s): node:child_process, node:path, node:test, node:assert/strict, node:os; 8 new file(s).
consequences: Adds dependency: node:child_process, node:path, node:test, node:assert/strict, node:os.
